name: Silvally

forms.name: Fighting
forms.pokedexDescription: Upon awakening, its RKS System is activated. By employing specific memories, this Pokémon can adapt to fighting type to confound its enemies.

pokedexDescription: Through the bond it formed with its Trainer, its will was strengthened, and it was able to destroy its control mask.
